name: Skitter Ashscale
sd_appearance: Small, wiry Kobold with charred ember-colored scales stands tall amidst the Undercity's Slums. His outfit consists of ash grey chainmail adorned with the Wardens of Ash badge, and a worn leather belt holding a warhammer and a crossbow. A machete strapped to his back gleams ominously in the dim light. A distinctive ash-mark on his left cheek, marking him as an officer, stands out against his scaly skin.
faction_visual: ash grey chainmail or plate, Warden badge, ash-mark on left cheek if officer
style_note: worn leather and chainmail, equipment that tells a story of past contracts
